title: OK Minimarket - Your friendly local grocer serving Hartenbos with heart
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Conveniently located on the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Conveniently located on the corner of Louis Fourie Road and Boekenhout Street (at the turn-off to Hartenbos Heuwels in the old 7-Eleven building), our store has proudly served the local community for the past 16 years.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Conveniently located on the corner of Louis Fourie Road and Boekenhout Street (at the turn-off to Hartenbos Heuwels in the old 7-Eleven building), our store has proudly served the local community for the past 16 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Privately owned by retail veterans Pambos and Andrew, who bring over 40 years of industry experience, the store is managed by the dedicated duo Rachel and Lucille. Together with a loyal team of 14 staff members - many of whom have been with us for years – we work hard to deliver a warm, reliable shopping experience every day.","html":"Privately owned by retail veterans Pambos and Andrew, who bring over 40 years of industry experience, the store is managed by the dedicated duo Rachel and Lucille. Together with a loyal team of 14 staff members - many of whom have been with us for years – we work hard to deliver a warm, reliable shopping experience every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are open Mondays to Sundays from 07:00 to 20:00, ready to meet your needs with our wide range of departments, including groceries, a fresh deli, in-house bakery, quality meats, wine selection, fruit & veg, and essential services like Lotto, airtime and prepaid electricity.","html":"We are open Mondays to Sundays from 07:00 to 20:00, ready to meet your needs with our wide range of departments, including groceries, a fresh deli, in-house bakery, quality meats, wine selection, fruit & veg, and essential services like Lotto, airtime and prepaid electricity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our recipe for success? Hard work, honesty and great relationships - with our staff, suppliers, and most importantly, our customers.","html":"Our recipe for success? Hard work, honesty and great relationships - with our staff, suppliers, and most importantly, our customers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We would like to extend a heartfelt thank you to our loyal supporters from Hartenbos and Mossel Bay, and our holiday visitors.","html":"We would like to extend a heartfelt thank you to our loyal supporters from Hartenbos and Mossel Bay, and our holiday visitors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your continued support means the world to us. We remain committed to serving you with excellence!","html":"Your continued support means the world to us. We remain committed to serving you with excellence!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Thank you for nominating OK Minimarket for the Best of Mossel Bay Reader's Choice Awards. Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo supplied.","html":"Photo supplied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo supplied.","html":"Photo supplied."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
